## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Classification / routing tuning
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (format, lint, typecheck, tests)
- [ ] `npm run package:check` passes
- [ ] If classification/routing changed: `npm run eval` still meets the agreement gate
- [ ] Added/updated tests (and an eval fixture if classification changed)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (Unreleased) and docs as needed
- [ ] No new secrets, no shell string interpolation, hook remains fail-open

<!-- Anything specific to look at, trade-offs, follow-ups. -->
